Boca Raton Home Loans

FHA loans in Boca Raton, Florida

Boca Raton is one of South Florida's most affluent communities, full of gated neighborhoods, country clubs, and condos. Because Palm Beach County is a designated high-cost area, its FHA limit sits above Florida's floor — which helps — but much of Boca's luxury market still exceeds FHA limits. The key is knowing where FHA fits: condos and mid-market homes in areas like East Boca and Boca del Mar.

What the FHA limit means in Boca Raton

Palm Beach County is a designated high-cost area, so its 2026 single-family FHA limit is above the $541,287 statewide floor — meaning you can finance higher-priced Boca Raton homes than in most of Florida. Because published figures vary, confirm Palm Beach County's exact limit with HUD's official FHA loan-limit lookup. Even so, much of Boca's luxury and country-club inventory exceeds FHA limits — FHA buyers here focus on condos and mid-market homes.

Where FHA fits in affluent Boca Raton

Boca's luxury homes are often beyond FHA's reach, but the loan is very usable on condos and mid-priced homes. For condos — common in Boca — the building must be FHA-approved or qualify for Single-Unit Approval; see our condo guide. Because the high-cost limit varies, we'll confirm Palm Beach County's exact figure with HUD and pinpoint the Boca homes that fit your FHA budget. The Florida FHA limits page adds context.

Down payment help for Boca Raton buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Boca Raton buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Palm Beach County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Boca Raton

We help buyers throughout Boca Raton and Palm Beach County, including East Boca, Boca del Mar, and the downtown Boca area. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Boca Raton (Palm Beach County) for 2026?+
Palm Beach County is a high-cost area, so its 2026 FHA limit is above the $541,287 Florida floor. Published figures vary, so confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Can I really use FHA in expensive Boca Raton?+
Yes, in the right segments. Much of Boca's luxury market exceeds FHA limits, but FHA works for condos and mid-market homes in areas like East Boca and Boca del Mar.
Can I buy a Boca Raton condo with FHA?+
Yes, if the building is FHA-approved or the unit qualifies for Single-Unit Approval. We verify before you offer.
How much down payment do I need in Boca Raton?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score; gift funds and seller credits help in a higher-priced market.
Do you serve all of Palm Beach County?+
Yes — Boca Raton, West Palm Beach, Boynton Beach, and surrounding communities.
